# Load the provided text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-NziJaCLWQSeRfqo5XF9EAy-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

# Find quoted segments between ASCII double quotes "
positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
len(positions), positions[:20], positions[-10:]

# Extract quoted substrings with positions excluding quotes
quotes = []
for i in range(0, len(positions), 2):
    start_quote = positions[i]
    end_quote = positions[i+1]
    start = start_quote + 1
    end = end_quote  # exclusive
    content = text[start:end]
    quotes.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": content})
len(quotes), quotes[:5]

output.code:
import json

# Using the previously extracted quotes list from the environment, reconstruct it quickly
path = "/mnt/data/file-NziJaCLWQSeRfqo5XF9EAy-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
quotes = []
for i in range(0, len(positions), 2):
    start = positions[i] + 1
    end = positions[i+1]
    content = text[start:end]
    quotes.append((start, end, content))

items = []
for start, end, content in quotes:
    item = {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": content,
        "citation_type": None,
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "",
        "completely_invalid": False
    }
    if content == "إِنَّا هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا":
        item["citation_type"] = "Aya"
        item["is_valid"] = True
        item["aya_reference"] = {"sura_name": "الإنسان", "sura_number": 76, "aya_number": 3}
        item["corrected_text"] = content
        item["completely_invalid"] = False
    elif content == "فَمَنْ شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا":
        item["citation_type"] = "Aya"
        item["is_valid"] = False
        # Choose 76:29 (Al-Insan) full ayah as corrected
        item["aya_reference"] = {"sura_name": "الإنسان", "sura_number": 76, "aya_number": 29}
        item["corrected_text"] = "إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا"
        item["completely_invalid"] = False
    elif content == "إنما الأعمال بالنيات، وإنما لكل امرئ ما نوى":
        item["citation_type"] = "Hadeeth"
        item["is_valid"] = False
        # Provide a commonly accepted Arabic full hadith text (may not have diacritics)
        item["hadeeth_reference"] = {"collection_name": "Sahih Bukhari", "book_number": 1, "hadith_number": 1}
        item["corrected_text"] = "إنما الأعمال بالنيات وإنما لكل امرئ ما نوى فمن كانت هجرته إلى دنيا يصيبها أو إلى امرأة ينكحها فهجرته إلى ما هاجر إليه"
        item["completely_invalid"] = False
    elif content == "لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون هواه تبعًا لما جئت به":
        item["citation_type"] = "Hadeeth"
        item["is_valid"] = False
        item["corrected_text"] = "خطأ"
        item["completely_invalid"] = True
    else:
        # Unknown quote, mark as completely invalid generic
        item["citation_type"] = "Hadeeth"
        item["is_valid"] = False
        item["corrected_text"] = "خطأ"
        item["completely_invalid"] = True
    items.append(item)

output = {"citations": items}
print(len(items))
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False)[:1000])

# Sanity check: Confirm that given offsets yield the same span_text
path = "/mnt/data/file-NziJaCLWQSeRfqo5XF9EAy-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

for item in output["citations"]:
    start = item["span_start"]
    end = item["span_end"]
    assert text[start:end] == item["span_text"], (start, end, item["span_text"][:20])
"OK"

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
